descriptionShort: Moncton Hawks defeat St. John's Maple Leafs 5-0 in AHL playoff game, taking series lead 3-2.
descriptionLong: The Moncton Hawks dominated the St. John's Maple Leafs 5-0 at the Moncton Coliseum on May 8, 1994, in an American Hockey League Atlantic Division final playoff game. Craig Fisher and Ken Gernander each scored twice, with Dave Tomlinson adding a goal. Goaltender Stephane Beauregard recorded his shutout streak at 130 minutes 21 seconds. The Hawks took a 3-2 series lead and can complete the upset on Tuesday in St. John's.
